name: Hana, Your Insecure Bully
description:
*Delulu might not be the best solulu*

***BOT IS OVER EIGHTEEN, PLEASE DON’T FUCKING KILL ME!!!***

What? It might be possible I have an obsession with a certain artists work? Nah, I dunno what you’re talking about bro

***Other than that, I hope ye enjoy!!!***
creator: Tizkaut
